roomDescByRace.goblin: One of your kind — a goblin — crouches in the darkness, watching.
roomDescByRace.human: A goblin crouches in the darkness. You can feel it watching.
roomDescByRace.elf: A goblin stirs in the dark. Low. Patient. Hungry.

lookTextByRace.goblin: Smaller than you expected. Meaner than you hoped. It sizes you up the same way you're sizing it up.
lookTextByRace.human: A goblin. Ragged, quick-eyed, and very aware of you.
lookTextByRace.elf: A goblin. It watches you with the focused attention of something that has decided you are interesting.

full.goblin: It hasn't broken a sweat. Eyes sharp, posture low. This one knows what it's doing.
full.human: It looks completely uninjured. Alert, focused. This won't be easy.
full.elf: It is unhurt. Its attention is entirely on you.

half.goblin: Dark stains on its side. Still moving though. Still mean.
half.human: It's wounded but fighting through it. Blood on its flank.
half.elf: It carries injury but hasn't slowed. Dangerous still.

low.goblin: It's struggling. Breathing hard. One more good hit.
low.human: It can barely hold its stance. Nearly done.
low.elf: It is close to the end. It knows this. So do you.

noticeByRace.goblin: It locks eyes with you. Neither of you moves. Yet.
noticeByRace.human: It locks eyes with you. You feel its intent.
noticeByRace.elf: Its eyes find yours. The air between you changes.

approachByRace.goblin: It takes a step toward you. Deliberate.
approachByRace.human: It moves closer. You can smell it now.

meleeByRace.goblin: It's on you. No more thinking.
meleeByRace.human: It lunges. You're in melee range.
meleeByRace.elf: It closes the gap. Combat has begun.

hitByRace.elf: It finds a gap. {dmg} damage. ({hp} hp)

deathByRace.goblin: It drops. Not quite pride. Not quite guilt.
deathByRace.human: The goblin falls. The silence returns.
deathByRace.elf: It collapses. You stand over it, uncertain what you feel.
